title: Judge Cannon in Trump case under fire, what to know
shortDescription: Judge Cannon has been criticized for delaying the case on Trump’s handling of classified documents. And colleagues have asked for her to step aside.

title: Trump's classified docs case begins 3 days of hearings | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: The Supreme Court upholds a controversial tax on foreign income. Excessive heat continues, and is as dangerous for animals as it is for people.

title: Melinda Gates backs Biden in first presidential endorsement
shortDescription: Melinda French Gates announced Thursday that she will be voting for President Joe Biden in the 2024 election.

title: Supreme Court upholds law banning domestic abusers from owning guns
shortDescription: Despite the Supreme Court's recent history of siding with gun rights the justices said some limits are permissible. Clarence Thomas was the lone dissenter.

title: Trial verdict helps Trump outpace Biden in May fundraising
shortDescription: Trump and the RNC raised $141 in May, compared with $85 million for Biden and the Democratic National Committee.

title: Pro-Trump group got $50 million from donor day after NY guilty verdict
shortDescription: Timothy Mellon, the ultra-wealthy banking heir, gave $50 million to a pro-Trump super PAC the day after the former president's New York conviction.

title: Iowa GOP House candidates have the edge in 4 congressional races: poll
shortDescription: Iowa’s likely voters prefer Republican candidates over Democrats in all four of the state’s congressional districts ahead of the November election.

title: What top judge’s recusal from Trump gag order case means for verdict
shortDescription: The Court of Appeals summarily rejected Donald Trump’s attempt to appeal his gag order. But he will almost certainly return to the high court.

title: Spotlight on special counsel in Trump's classified records case
shortDescription: Judge Aileen Cannon set 3 days of hearings about dismissing Donald Trump's classified documents charges or excluding evidence from Mar-a-Lago search

title: VP Harris to visit Nevada in post-debate push aimed at Hispanic voters
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris will make the case to Hispanic voters during a trip to Las Vegas the day after Joe Biden's debate with Donald Trump.

title: Will Biden and Trump be sitting or standing for presidential debate?
shortDescription: All rise! The first presidential debate of the 2024 election season will be standing only.

title: Judge Aileen Cannon refused to pass on Trump documents case: NYT
shortDescription: The judge in former President Donald Trump's classified documents case rejected colleague's suggestions to step aside, the New York Times reported.

title: Trump will get the last word, Biden will pick his podium for first debate
shortDescription: CNN, which is hosting the debate, said Biden’s campaign won a coin flip against Trump’s campaign – choosing tails.

title: Who is Jake Tapper? Meet one of the Biden-Trump debate moderators
shortDescription: Jake Tapper hosts 'The Lead with Jake Tapper' and the 'State of Union' on CNN. He will be a moderator on the first presidential debate on June 27.

title: Who is Dana Bash? Meet one of the Biden-Trump debate moderators
shortDescription: Dana Bash hosts several shows and series on CNN including 'State of the Union' and 'Inside Politics. She will be a co-moderator of the June debate.

title: How Donald Trump and Joe Biden are preparing for their debate next week
shortDescription: With one week to go, Biden holds 'debate camp,' while Trump meets with advisers and holds a campaign rally

title: Record cited as proof Joe Biden died is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: A fake death notice is the latest example of social media users claiming President Joe Biden died and has been replaced by a double.

title: Ballot drop boxes and mail-in voting under scrutiny
shortDescription: In the lead up to the November 2024 general election, ballot drop boxes and mail-in voting are under increased scrutiny.

title: OnPolitics: Will Donald Trump pick Doug Burgum as his running mate?
shortDescription: Political observers noticed that a website combining Doug Burgum's name with Donald Trump's redirects to the former president's campaign website.

title: GOP incumbents sweep Oklahoma U.S. House primary elections
shortDescription: The results are in: Republican incumbents win their respective primaries in Oklahoma congressional races

title: Will Donald Trump pick Doug Burgum as his running mate? Website fuels VP speculation
shortDescription: The trumpburgum.com website was redirecting to Donald Trump's office campaign site Thursday, inviting speculation that Doug Burgum is the VP pick.
